3146710.name: Food Rush
3146710.description:
Food Rush is a Restaurant Sim where the player must battle the ever-rising costs of business. Reach the goal day without going out of business to pass the level.

Customize the kitchen and the front of the restaurant to your liking, provide fast service to get high streaks of customers served for extra cash, Hire workers to assist you in running the store from Waiters, Cleaners and Cashiers, and Manage the finances of the rising upkeep of daily costs, food and staff costs.


  • Customize the store
  • Run the kitchen
  • Hire staff
  • Manage Finances
  • Reach high scores
3146710.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
